# Al Egaby General Trading LLC — Full Documentation

> This is the detailed companion to [llms.txt](https://www.alegaby.com/llms.txt). It contains complete product catalogs, brand portfolios, and technical specifications for Al Egaby's HVAC equipment and building materials inventory.

## Contact

- **Legal Name:** Al Egaby Gen. Tr. (L.L.C)
- **Brand Name:** Alegaby
- **Business Type:** Wholesaler / Trading Company
- **Location:** Office 201, Orange Building, Al Qulayaa, Sharjah, UAE
- **Phone:** [+971 6 522 0089](tel:+97165220089)
- **Mobile / WhatsApp:** [+971 56 888 0263](https://wa.me/971568880263)
- **Email:** [info@alegaby.com](mailto:info@alegaby.com)
- **Website:** [https://www.alegaby.com](https://www.alegaby.com)
- **Hours:** Monday–Saturday 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM (always available via email)
- **Delivery:** Within 24 hours across all UAE Emirates

---

## HVAC Equipment — Detailed Catalog

### AC Compressors
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/categories/compressors](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/compressors)

Al Egaby is a leading AC compressor supplier in Dubai and Sharjah. We stock original scroll compressors, reciprocating compressors, and semi-hermetic compressors from top brands including Copeland, Bristol, Mitsubishi, Danfoss, and Bitzer. Our compressor inventory covers capacities for residential split AC systems through to large commercial chillers and industrial refrigeration units. All compressors come with manufacturer warranty and are available at competitive wholesale pricing with same-day dispatch across the UAE.

**Products:** Scroll Compressors, Reciprocating Compressors, Semi-Hermetic Compressors, Rotary Compressors, Compressor Spare Parts, Crankcase Heaters

**Brands:** Copeland, Bristol, Mitsubishi, Danfoss, Emerson

---

### Thermostats & Controls
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/categories/thermostats](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/thermostats)

Al Egaby supplies a comprehensive range of HVAC thermostats and temperature controls across the UAE. Our thermostat inventory includes Honeywell digital room thermostats, Siemens programmable thermostats, White-Rodgers fan coil controllers, and smart Wi-Fi thermostats for residential and commercial applications. We also stock humidity controllers, differential pressure switches, and building management system components. Wholesale pricing and technical support available for contractors and MEP companies in Dubai, Sharjah, and all Emirates.

**Products:** Room Thermostats, Programmable Thermostats, Smart Thermostats, Fan Coil Controllers, Humidity Controllers, Pressure Switches

**Brands:** Honeywell, Siemens, White-Rodgers, Resideo

---

### HVAC Valves
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/categories/valves](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/valves)

Al Egaby is your one-stop HVAC valve supplier in Dubai and Sharjah. We stock solenoid valves, expansion valves (TEV and EEV), motorized ball valves, check valves, pressure relief valves, and zone valves from top manufacturers including Honeywell, Danfoss, Siemens, Castel, and Parker. Our valves serve residential, commercial, and industrial HVAC and refrigeration systems. Wholesale pricing and immediate availability for contractors across the UAE.

**Products:** Solenoid Valves, Expansion Valves, Ball Valves, Check Valves, Zone Valves, Pressure Relief Valves

**Brands:** Honeywell, Danfoss, Siemens, Castel, Parker

---

### Refrigerant Gases
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/categories/refrigerants](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/refrigerants)

Al Egaby is a major refrigerant gas distributor in the UAE. We stock all common refrigerant types including R410A, R134a, R22, R404A, R407C, R32, and R290 from trusted brands like Refron, Honeywell Genetron, Floron, and Mafron. Available in disposable cylinders and refillable tanks for residential AC servicing, commercial refrigeration, and industrial applications. Bulk pricing and regular delivery schedules available for AC service companies and maintenance contractors across Dubai, Sharjah, Abu Dhabi, and all Emirates.

**Products:** R410A, R134a, R22, R404A, R407C, R32, Refrigerant Recovery Cylinders

**Brands:** Refron, Honeywell, Floron, Mafron

---

### Copper Tubes & Fittings
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/categories/copper-fittings](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/copper-fittings)

Al Egaby is a leading copper tube and fitting supplier for HVAC and refrigeration piping in the UAE. We stock ACR copper tubes in all standard sizes from 1/4" to 4-1/8", along with copper elbows, tees, reducers, couplings, and pre-insulated line sets. Our brands include Mueller, Maksal, Halcor, and Harris brazing alloys. Whether you need soft-drawn coils for split AC installation or hard-drawn tubes for commercial chilled water systems, we have wholesale stock available for contractors in Dubai, Sharjah, and across the Emirates.

**Products:** ACR Copper Tubes, Copper Elbows, Copper Tees, Reducers, Couplings, Line Sets, Brazing Alloys

**Brands:** Mueller, Maksal, Halcor, Harris

---

### Split AC Units
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/categories/split-ac](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/split-ac)

Al Egaby supplies split air conditioning units across the UAE at competitive wholesale prices. Our range includes wall-mount split AC, ceiling cassette units, and ducted split systems from premium brands including Daikin, O General, Carrier, Aux, and Sapphire. We cater to residential, commercial, and light industrial applications with capacities from 1 ton to 5+ tons. Installation accessories and spare parts also available. Wholesale pricing for contractors and project buyers in Dubai, Sharjah, and all Emirates.

**Products:** Wall-Mount Split AC, Ceiling Cassette AC, Ducted Split AC, Floor Standing AC, AC Remote Controls

**Brands:** Daikin, O General, Carrier, Aux, Sapphire

---

### Electric Motors
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/categories/motors](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/motors)

Al Egaby stocks a wide range of HVAC electric motors for air conditioning and refrigeration applications across the UAE. Our motor inventory includes condenser fan motors, evaporator fan motors, blower motors, EC motors, and PSC motors from GE, Pioneer, ELCO, and other trusted brands. We carry motors in all common wattages and speeds for split AC, package units, AHUs, and commercial refrigeration. Wholesale pricing and fast dispatch for technicians and contractors in Dubai, Sharjah, and across the Emirates.

**Products:** Condenser Fan Motors, Evaporator Fan Motors, Blower Motors, EC Motors, PSC Motors, Motor Capacitors

**Brands:** GE, Pioneer, ELCO

---

### HVAC Accessories
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/categories/hvac-accessories](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/hvac-accessories)

Al Egaby is a comprehensive HVAC accessories supplier in the UAE. We stock contactors, relays, run capacitors, start capacitors, thermometers, pressure gauges, solenoid valves, filter driers, sight glasses, vibration eliminators, and more. Our accessories support AC installation, repair, and maintenance for residential, commercial, and industrial systems. Wholesale pricing for HVAC technicians, service companies, and contractors across Dubai, Sharjah, and all Emirates.

**Products:** Contactors, Relays, Capacitors, Thermometers, Pressure Gauges, Filter Driers, Sight Glasses

**Brands:** Honeywell, Danfoss, Castel, Parker

---

### Ducting & Insulation
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/categories/insulation](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/insulation)

Al Egaby supplies a complete range of HVAC insulation materials across the UAE. Our insulation products include elastomeric rubber pipe insulation (Aerofoam), glass wool blankets and boards (Kimmco Isover), duct wrap, acoustic insulation, and insulation adhesives and tapes. We cater to residential, commercial, and industrial HVAC projects requiring thermal insulation for chilled water pipes, refrigerant lines, ductwork, and equipment. Wholesale pricing for MEP contractors in Dubai, Sharjah, and all Emirates.

**Products:** Pipe Insulation, Duct Insulation, Glass Wool Blankets, Rubber Foam Sheets, Insulation Tape, Insulation Adhesive

**Brands:** Kimmco Isover, Aerofoam

---

## Building Materials — Detailed Catalog

### Power & Hand Tools
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/categories/tools](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/tools)

Al Egaby is a leading power tools and hand tools supplier in the UAE. We carry professional-grade tools from Makita, DeWalt, Stanley, Bosch, Rothenberger, and Uken including cordless drills, angle grinders, circular saws, wrenches, pliers, screwdrivers, and measuring tools. Our tools serve construction professionals, HVAC technicians, plumbers, electricians, and maintenance teams. Wholesale pricing and full warranty support for contractors and hardware retailers across Dubai, Sharjah, and the Emirates.

**Products:** Cordless Drills, Angle Grinders, Circular Saws, Wrenches, Pliers, Measuring Tools

**Brands:** Makita, DeWalt, Stanley, Bosch, Uken, Rothenberger

---

### Paint & Coatings
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/categories/paint-coatings](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/paint-coatings)

Al Egaby is a major paint and coatings distributor in the UAE. We stock a comprehensive range from Jotun, National Paints, and Berger Paints including interior emulsions, exterior weather-resistant coatings, industrial protective coatings, primers, wood finishes, and painting accessories like brushes, rollers, and thinners. Our products are formulated for the demanding UAE climate and meet all regional building codes. Wholesale pricing for painting contractors, developers, and project managers in Dubai, Sharjah, and all Emirates.

**Products:** Interior Paint, Exterior Paint, Industrial Coatings, Primers, Wood Finishes, Brushes & Rollers, Thinners

**Brands:** Jotun, National Paints, Berger Paints

---

### Construction Materials
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/categories/construction-materials](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/construction-materials)

Al Egaby supplies essential construction materials across the UAE. Our range includes Portland cement, white cement, gypsum boards, gypsum panels, gypsum tiles, plaster of Paris, and waterproofing compounds. We source from trusted manufacturers to ensure consistent quality for residential, commercial, and infrastructure projects. Wholesale and bulk pricing available for contractors, developers, and construction companies in Dubai, Sharjah, and throughout the Emirates.

**Products:** Portland Cement, White Cement, Gypsum Board, Gypsum Panels, Gypsum Tiles, Waterproofing Compounds

---

### Hardware & Fasteners
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/categories/hardware-fasteners](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/hardware-fasteners)

Al Egaby is a comprehensive hardware and fastener supplier for construction and industrial projects in the UAE. Our inventory includes nuts, bolts, washers, anchor bolts, threaded rods, strut channels, beam clamps, pipe clamps, shovel handles, plywood sheets, insulation tape, aluminum tape, aluminum glass tape, foam tape, sealants, and adhesives. We supply in bulk at wholesale prices for contractors, MEP companies, and construction firms across Dubai, Sharjah, and the Emirates.

**Products:** Nuts & Bolts, Anchor Bolts, Threaded Rods, Strut Channels, Clamps, Sealants, Tapes

---

### Plumbing & Sanitary
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/categories/plumbing-sanitary](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/plumbing-sanitary)

Al Egaby supplies plumbing and sanitary products across the UAE. Our range includes UPVC pipes and fittings (Cosmoplast), brass valves and fittings (Pegler), bathroom faucets and shower systems (Grohe), water heaters (Ariston), and a full range of plumbing accessories. We serve residential and commercial construction projects with wholesale pricing for plumbing contractors, developers, and MEP companies in Dubai, Sharjah, and all Emirates.

**Products:** UPVC Pipes, Brass Fittings, Faucets, Shower Systems, Water Heaters, Bathroom Accessories

**Brands:** Grohe, Pegler, Ariston, Cosmoplast

---

### Safety Products
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/categories/safety-products](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/safety-products)

Al Egaby supplies construction safety products and personal protective equipment (PPE) across the UAE. Our safety range includes hard hats, safety glasses, work gloves, safety boots, high-visibility vests, ear protection, respiratory masks, and safety harnesses. All products meet international and UAE safety standards. Wholesale pricing for construction companies, industrial facilities, and safety managers in Dubai, Sharjah, and across the Emirates.

**Products:** Hard Hats, Safety Glasses, Work Gloves, Safety Boots, High-Vis Vests, Respiratory Masks

---

### Electrical Products
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/categories/electrical](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/electrical)

Al Egaby is a major electrical products supplier in the UAE. Our range includes power cables (Ducab, Oman Cables), switches and sockets (Schneider, ABB, MK Electric), circuit breakers and distribution boards, LED lighting (Philips, Osram), cable management systems (Decoduct), and a full range of electrical accessories. We serve electrical contractors, panel builders, and construction companies with wholesale pricing and stock availability across Dubai, Sharjah, and the Emirates.

**Products:** Power Cables, Switches & Sockets, Circuit Breakers, LED Lighting, Cable Management, Distribution Boards

**Brands:** Schneider Electric, ABB, Ducab, Oman Cables, Philips, Osram, MK Electric, Decoduct

---

## HVAC Brand Portfolios

### Honeywell
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/brands/honeywell](https://www.alegaby.com/brands/honeywell)

Al Egaby is a trusted supplier of genuine Honeywell HVAC products across the UAE. Our Honeywell range includes smart thermostats, zone valves, actuators, gas valves, pressure controls, and building automation components. Honeywell is a global leader in HVAC controls technology, and we maintain wholesale stock for contractors, MEP companies, and facility management teams in Dubai, Sharjah, Abu Dhabi, and across the Emirates.

**Products:** Thermostats, Zone Valves, Actuators, Gas Valves, Pressure Controls, Building Automation Components

---

### Copeland
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/brands/copeland](https://www.alegaby.com/brands/copeland)

Al Egaby is a premium Copeland compressor supplier in the UAE. We carry scroll compressors, reciprocating compressors, and semi-hermetic compressors for residential, commercial, and industrial HVAC and refrigeration applications. Copeland compressors by Emerson are trusted worldwide for reliability, efficiency, and long service life. Available at wholesale prices with fast dispatch across Dubai, Sharjah, Abu Dhabi, and all UAE Emirates.

**Products:** Scroll Compressors, Reciprocating Compressors, Semi-Hermetic Compressors, Compressor Spare Parts

---

### Daikin
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/brands/daikin](https://www.alegaby.com/brands/daikin)

Al Egaby is a trusted Daikin AC spare parts and equipment supplier in the UAE. We stock Daikin split AC units, VRV system components, chiller parts, compressors, PCBs, and filters. Daikin is the world's largest air conditioning manufacturer, and our wholesale stock supports installers, MEP contractors, and facility managers across Dubai, Sharjah, Abu Dhabi, and the entire UAE market.

**Products:** Split AC Units, VRV Components, Chiller Parts, Compressors, PCBs, Filters

---

### Danfoss
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/brands/danfoss](https://www.alegaby.com/brands/danfoss)

Al Egaby is a trusted Danfoss product supplier in the UAE, offering a comprehensive range of HVAC and refrigeration components. Our Danfoss stock includes expansion valves, solenoid valves, pressure switches, compressors, and variable frequency drives. Danfoss is a global leader in energy-efficient solutions for climate and cooling.

**Products:** Expansion Valves, Solenoid Valves, Pressure Switches, Compressors, VFDs

---

### Refron
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/brands/refron](https://www.alegaby.com/brands/refron)

Al Egaby is a leading Refron refrigerant gas distributor in the UAE. We stock the full range of Refron refrigerant gases including R410A, R134a, R22, R404A, and R407C in various cylinder sizes. Refron refrigerants meet international quality standards and are the preferred choice for HVAC contractors and refrigeration technicians across Dubai, Sharjah, Abu Dhabi, and the wider GCC region.

**Products:** R410A Refrigerant, R134a Refrigerant, R22 Refrigerant, R404A Refrigerant, R407C Refrigerant

---

### Emerson
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/brands/emerson](https://www.alegaby.com/brands/emerson)

Al Egaby supplies Emerson HVAC and refrigeration products across the UAE, including Copeland compressors, Alco Controls expansion valves, and White-Rodgers thermostats. Emerson Climate Technologies is a global leader in heating, ventilation, air conditioning, and refrigeration solutions.

**Products:** Compressors, Expansion Valves, Electronic Controllers, Pressure Regulators

---

### Siemens
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/brands/siemens](https://www.alegaby.com/brands/siemens)

Al Egaby supplies Siemens building technologies and HVAC control products across the UAE. Our Siemens range includes room thermostats, control valves, valve actuators, sensors, and building automation system components.

**Products:** Room Thermostats, Control Valves, Valve Actuators, Temperature Sensors, BMS Components

---

### Mueller
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/brands/mueller](https://www.alegaby.com/brands/mueller)

Al Egaby stocks the complete Mueller copper tube and fitting range for HVAC and refrigeration piping. Mueller Industries is a world leader in copper products, and our inventory includes ACR copper tubing, copper fittings, line sets, and accessories for air conditioning installation.

**Products:** ACR Copper Tubes, Copper Fittings, Line Sets, Copper Accessories

---

### York
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/brands/york](https://www.alegaby.com/brands/york)

Al Egaby supplies York air conditioning spare parts and components across the UAE. Our York range includes chiller parts, compressor components, AHU filters and belts, control boards, sensors, and refrigerant components. York by Johnson Controls is one of the most widely installed AC brands in the Middle East.

**Products:** Chiller Parts, Compressor Components, AHU Parts, Control Boards, Sensors

---

### Kimmco Isover
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/brands/kimmco-isover](https://www.alegaby.com/brands/kimmco-isover)

Al Egaby is a leading distributor of Kimmco Isover insulation products in the UAE. Our range includes glass wool blankets, pipe sections, duct wraps, and acoustic insulation for HVAC systems and building construction.

**Products:** Glass Wool Blankets, Pipe Insulation, Duct Wrap, Acoustic Insulation, Thermal Board

---

### Aerofoam
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/brands/aerofoam](https://www.alegaby.com/brands/aerofoam)

Al Egaby is a leading Aerofoam insulation distributor in the UAE. Our Aerofoam range includes closed-cell elastomeric rubber insulation in tube and sheet form for HVAC piping, ductwork, and equipment.

**Products:** Pipe Insulation Tubes, Insulation Sheets, Adhesive & Tape, Duct Insulation

---

## Building Materials Brand Portfolios

### Jotun
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/brands/jotun](https://www.alegaby.com/brands/jotun)

Al Egaby is an authorized Jotun paint distributor in the UAE. We stock the complete range of Jotun decorative and protective coatings including Jotashield exterior paint, Majestic interior paint, and industrial coatings for steel structures. Jotun is a Norwegian brand trusted for durability in the harsh UAE climate.

**Products:** Interior Paint, Exterior Paint, Industrial Coatings, Primers, Wood Finishes

---

### Makita
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/brands/makita](https://www.alegaby.com/brands/makita)

Al Egaby is a leading Makita power tools supplier in the UAE. Our Makita range includes cordless drills, angle grinders, circular saws, rotary hammers, impact drivers, and accessories. Makita is a Japanese brand trusted by professionals worldwide for reliability and performance.

**Products:** Cordless Drills, Angle Grinders, Circular Saws, Rotary Hammers, Impact Drivers

---

### DeWalt
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/brands/dewalt](https://www.alegaby.com/brands/dewalt)

Al Egaby supplies the full range of DeWalt professional power tools across the UAE. Our DeWalt inventory includes cordless combo kits, hammer drills, demolition breakers, table saws, and a complete range of accessories and consumables.

**Products:** Cordless Combo Kits, Hammer Drills, Demolition Breakers, Table Saws, Accessories

---

### Schneider Electric
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/brands/schneider-electric](https://www.alegaby.com/brands/schneider-electric)

Al Egaby distributes Schneider Electric products across the UAE. Our Schneider range includes switches, sockets, MCBs, RCCBs, distribution boards, contactors, and building automation components. Schneider Electric is a global leader in energy management and automation.

**Products:** Switches & Sockets, MCBs & RCCBs, Distribution Boards, Contactors, Automation Components

---

### ABB
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/brands/abb](https://www.alegaby.com/brands/abb)

Al Egaby supplies ABB electrical and automation products across the UAE. Our ABB range includes miniature circuit breakers, molded case circuit breakers, switches, sockets, contactors, and variable frequency drives.

**Products:** Circuit Breakers, Switches & Sockets, Contactors, Variable Frequency Drives

---

### Grohe
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/brands/grohe](https://www.alegaby.com/brands/grohe)

Al Egaby distributes Grohe bathroom and kitchen fittings across the UAE. Our Grohe range includes faucets, shower systems, flush plates, and sanitary accessories for residential and commercial projects. Grohe is a German brand recognized worldwide for innovation in water technology.

**Products:** Faucets, Shower Systems, Flush Plates, Sanitary Accessories

---

### Ariston
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/brands/ariston](https://www.alegaby.com/brands/ariston)

Al Egaby is an Ariston water heater supplier in the UAE. Our Ariston range includes electric storage water heaters, instant water heaters, and heat pump systems for residential and commercial applications.

**Products:** Electric Water Heaters, Instant Water Heaters, Heat Pump Systems, Spare Parts

---

### Ducab
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/brands/ducab](https://www.alegaby.com/brands/ducab)

Al Egaby is a Ducab cable supplier in the UAE. We stock Ducab power cables, fire-rated cables (LSZH), control cables, and instrumentation cables for residential, commercial, and industrial projects. Products meet international IEC and BS standards.

**Products:** Power Cables, Fire-Rated Cables, Control Cables, Instrumentation Cables

---

### Philips
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/brands/philips](https://www.alegaby.com/brands/philips)

Al Egaby supplies Philips lighting products across the UAE. Our Philips range includes LED bulbs, LED panels, downlights, outdoor lighting, and smart lighting solutions for homes, offices, and commercial spaces.

**Products:** LED Bulbs, LED Panels, Downlights, Outdoor Lighting, Smart Lighting

---

### Karcher
**Page:** [https://www.alegaby.com/brands/karcher](https://www.alegaby.com/brands/karcher)

Al Egaby supplies Karcher cleaning equipment across the UAE. Our Karcher range includes high-pressure washers, wet and dry vacuum cleaners, steam cleaners, and floor scrubbers for residential, commercial, and industrial use.

**Products:** Pressure Washers, Vacuum Cleaners, Steam Cleaners, Floor Scrubbers, Accessories

---

*For enquiries, call [+971 6 522 0089](tel:+97165220089), [WhatsApp us](https://wa.me/971568880263), or email [info@alegaby.com](mailto:info@alegaby.com). Visit us at Office 201, Orange Building, Al Qulayaa, Sharjah, UAE.*
